sample_valid_maps.action: Provide Key Fact Statement (KFS) to borrowers before loan contract execution, including APR, recovery mechanism, and cooling-off period details
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 5(a) mandates KFS disclosure before contract execution — Compliance owns disclosure obligations, Critical due to immediate regulatory mandate effective November 30, 2022

sample_valid_maps.action: Implement system to compute and display Annual Percentage Rate (APR) on net disbursed amount for all digital loan products
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 5(b) requires APR disclosure upfront — IT owns platform implementation, Critical priority due to mandatory regulatory requirement with explicit November 2022 deadline

sample_valid_maps.action: Designate a Nodal Grievance Redressal Officer for digital lending complaints and display contact details on website and DLA
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 6(a) mandates grievance officer designation — Legal owns compliance obligations, High priority due to customer-facing regulatory requirement

sample_valid_maps.action: Ensure all borrower data collected by Digital Lending Apps is stored exclusively on servers located within India
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 8(b) mandates data localisation — IT owns infrastructure decisions, High priority due to data sovereignty requirement

sample_valid_maps.action: Conduct annual audit of all Lending Service Provider (LSP) integrations by an independent audit firm and submit report to Board's Risk Management Committee within 90 days of financial year-end
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 9(b) mandates annual LSP audit — Compliance oversees audit obligations, High priority due to ongoing governance requirement

sample_valid_maps.action: Implement comprehensive cybersecurity framework for all digital lending applications including penetration testing, vulnerability assessments, and security patch management
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 10(a) mandates cybersecurity framework — IT owns security implementation, Critical due to mandatory regulatory requirement

sample_valid_maps.action: Submit quarterly report to RBI on digital loan volume, outstanding portfolio, LSPs engaged, and customer grievances by December 31, 2022 for first report
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 11(a-b) mandates quarterly regulatory reporting — Compliance owns regulatory submissions, High priority with explicit December 2022 deadline

sample_valid_maps.action: Board of Directors to approve a Digital Lending Policy covering risk management, customer protection, technology governance, LSP oversight, and grievance framework within 90 days
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 12(a) mandates Board-approved policy within 90 days — Legal supports policy drafting, High priority due to governance requirement
